title: pyrus zhejiangensis
intro: Pyrus zhejiangensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the Zhejiang pear. It is a deciduous tree native to China, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting immune function. Pyrus zhejiangensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
